status.label: Status
status.reason: editable (not readOnly) so NEO writes the 'DR' default on POST; form:false keeps it out of the edit form so users cannot change it directly

processed.reason: Needed for readOnly logic on movementDate; not shown in UI

processNow.reason: Action endpoint must be active (system); button rendered via moreMenuContent with flat { action: 'CO' } body

posted.reason: Accounting post action — not applicable to simplified UI

storageBin.label: Warehouse
storageBin.reason: Each warehouse has exactly 1 storage bin; shown as warehouse selector for user clarity

attributeSetValue.reason: Attribute set complexity not needed in simplified UI

orderQuantity.reason: Second UOM quantity — not needed in simplified UI

orderUOM.reason: Second UOM — not needed in simplified UI

voidedInternalConsumptionLine.reason: Only relevant for voided records; void not implemented in simplified UI

SL_Internal_Consumption_Product.description: Auto-fills UOM and storage bin from product selection. Source not found — classic UI only.
SL_Internal_Consumption_Product.impactIfOmitted: Users must manually set UOM and storage bin after selecting a product. Backend fills UOM on save.

SL_Internal_Consumption_Conversion_UOM.description: UOM conversion triggered on Order UOM change. Source not found — classic UI only.
SL_Internal_Consumption_Conversion_UOM.impactIfOmitted: No auto-conversion between UOMs; backend handles on save. Order UOM field is discarded.

SL_Internal_Consumption_Conversion_Qty.description: UOM conversion triggered on Order Quantity change. Source not found — classic UI only.
SL_Internal_Consumption_Conversion_Qty.impactIfOmitted: No auto-conversion between UOMs; backend handles on save. Order Quantity field is discarded.

READONLY_MovementDate_Processed.description: Movement Date becomes read-only when Processed=Y (status CO).
READONLY_MovementDate_Processed.impactIfOmitted: Users could edit the date on completed consumptions.

DISPLAY_ProcessButton_NotVoided.description: Process button visible when status != 'VO'. Implemented in InternalConsumptionActions custom component.
DISPLAY_ProcessButton_NotVoided.impactIfOmitted: Process button would show on voided records.

DISPLAY_Posted.description: Posted field display logic — Posted field is discarded.

DISPLAY_AccountingDimensions.description: Activity, Campaign, Dimensions, TrxOrg, CostCenter display logic — all discarded.

DISPLAY_AttributeSetValue.description: Attribute Set Value display logic — field is discarded.

DISPLAY_OrderUOM_OrderQty.description: Order UOM and Order Quantity display logic — both fields are discarded.

DISPLAY_VoidedLine.description: Voided Internal Consumption Line display logic — field is discarded.

READONLY_Project_Posted.description: Project read-only logic — Project field is discarded.

PROCESS_ProcessInternalConsumption.description: Process Internal Consumption (M_Internal_Consumption_Post). Requires action='CO'. Implemented in InternalConsumptionActions moreMenuContent component with flat JSON body.
PROCESS_ProcessInternalConsumption.impactIfOmitted: Users cannot complete consumptions from the UI.

PROCESS_Posted.description: Posted hardcoded button — accounting posting handled through backend.
